creator: vivek@khera.org
text:
I agree. slony1 v 1.2 hasn't bee updated in over a year. I don't know =
for sure what maximum version of postgres it supports. I do not think it =
is actively maintained anymore, but exists for historical installations =
of older postgres.

If the proposed patch will disallow building slony1 against versions of =
postgres newer than 9.1, then go for it. I don't know what other =
solutions there are.

Personally, I've moved on to slony1 version 2.1.=
